ValidationRule.description: [AUT,CHE,HRV,HUN,SRB,SVN]: Restriction the user to Commercial_Gesture_Amount__c value when the field Commercial_Gesture__c value is yes.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), ISPICKVAL(Commercial_Gesture__c,"Yes"), ISBLANK(Commercial_Gesture_Amount__c), CONTAINS( $Label.ALDCRM_Commercial_Gesture_Amount_Record_Types, RecordTypeId ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The amount of the commercial gesture has to be entered.
